title: Deep Learning Job-Ready Bootcamp
subtitle: Build Neural Networks, Computer Vision & Modern AI Systems
description: Become a Deep Learning Engineer in 8 Weeks. Build neural networks, computer vision models, and modern AI systems using PyTorch & TensorFlow.

projects.title: Image Classification System
projects.description: Build a CNN model to classify complex visual images.

projects.title: NLP Sentiment Classifier
projects.description: Develop a sequence-based text analysis network.

projects.title: Deployed AI App
projects.description: Deploy a deep learning neural network as a web application.

projects.title: Capstone Transformer
projects.description: Train or fine-tune a modern transformer model for specific tasks.

requirements: Good knowledge of Python and basic Machine Learning algorithms
Basic familiarity with calculus and linear algebra

curriculum.title: Deep Neural Networks Foundations

lessons.title: Introduction to Neural Networks, Perceptron & Backpropagation
Loss functions, optimizers, learning rate & weight initialization

curriculum.practice: Build a multi-layer perceptron from scratch in PyTorch
curriculum.outcome: Understand mathematical foundations of neural networks and train simple models.

curriculum.title: Computer Vision & CNNs

lessons.title: Convolutional Neural Networks: Padding, pooling, & strides

curriculum.practice: Build and train an image classifier on custom product images
curriculum.outcome: Implement convolutional architectures and leverage transfer learning for vision.

curriculum.title: NLP & Transformers & Model Deployment

lessons.title: Recurrent networks, LSTMs & introduction to Transformers
Model optimization, quantization & deployment using FastAPI

curriculum.practice: Deploy an NLP or Image classification model on a live web app
curriculum.outcome: Be job-ready as a Deep Learning, AI, or Machine Learning Engineer with a deployed app.

features: Hands-on model building with PyTorch & TensorFlow
Learn real-world AI use cases: vision, text, and sequences
Get model optimization and deployment training
Prepares you for Deep Learning Engineer, AI Engineer, and ML Engineer roles
